])?;


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("cloudflare-kv", [

    // The token used to authenticate with CloudFlare.

    // ("api_token".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // The account ID used to authenticate with CloudFlare. Used as URI path parameter.

    // ("account_id".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // The namespace ID. Used as URI path parameter.

    // ("namespace_id".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // The default ttl for write operations.

    // ("default_ttl".to_string(), "10s".to_string()),


    // Root within this backend.

    // ("root".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


])?;


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General5

| Key           | Type     | Required | Description                                                                      |
| ------------- | -------- | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| api\_token    | string   | no       | The token used to authenticate with CloudFlare.                                  |
| account\_id   | string   | no       | The account ID used to authenticate with CloudFlare. Used as URI path parameter. |
| namespace\_id | string   | no       | The namespace ID. Used as URI path parameter.                                    |
| default\_ttl  | duration | no       | The default ttl for write operations.                                            |
| root          | string   | no       | Root within this backend.                                                        |

# compfs

RustPythonNode.js

Quick start

```

import { Operator } from "opendal";

});


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import { Operator } from "opendal";


const op = new Operator("compfs", {

  // root of this backend.

  //

  // All operations will happen under this root.

  // root: "...",


});


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General1

| Key  | Type   | Required | Description                                                       |
| ---- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| root | string | no       | root of this backend. All operations will happen under this root. |

# cos

8 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

Operator op = Operator.of("cos", conf);


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

// Root of this backend.

// conf.put("root", "...");


// Endpoint of this backend.

// conf.put("endpoint", "...");


// Secret ID of this backend.

// conf.put("secret_id", "...");


// Secret key of this backend.

// conf.put("secret_key", "...");


// Security token (a.k.a. session token) of this backend.

//

// This is used for temporary credentials issued by Tencent Cloud STS

// (e.g. `GetFederationToken` / `AssumeRole`). When `security_token` is

// provided, it will be used together with `secret_id` and `secret_key`

// to sign requests, and the `x-cos-security-token` header will be

// attached automatically by the signer.

//

// If this field is not set, OpenDAL will also fall back to reading

// the token from environment variables `TENCENTCLOUD_TOKEN`,

// `TENCENTCLOUD_SECURITY_TOKEN` or `QCLOUD_SECRET_TOKEN` (unless

// `disable_config_load` is enabled).

// conf.put("security_token", "...");


// Bucket of this backend.

// conf.put("bucket", "...");


// Disable config load so that opendal will not load config from

// conf.put("disable_config_load", "true");


Operator op = Operator.of("cos", conf);


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General8

| Key                          | Type   | Required | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ---------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| root                         | string | no       | Root of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| endpoint                     | string | no       | Endpoint of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| secret\_id                   | string | no       | Secret ID of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| secret\_key                  | string | no       | Secret key of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| security\_token              | string | no       | Security token (a.k.a. session token) of this backend. This is used for temporary credentials issued by Tencent Cloud STS (e.g. GetFederationToken / AssumeRole). When security\_token is provided, it will be used together with secret\_id and secret\_keyto sign requests, and the x-cos-security-token header will be attached automatically by the signer. If this field is not set, OpenDAL will also fall back to reading the token from environment variables TENCENTCLOUD\_TOKEN,TENCENTCLOUD\_SECURITY\_TOKEN or QCLOUD\_SECRET\_TOKEN (unlessdisable\_config\_load is enabled). |
| bucket                       | string | no       | Bucket of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| enable\_versioningdeprecated | bool   | no       | Deprecated: COS versioning capability is enabled by default.Deprecated since 0.57.0: COS versioning capability is enabled by default and this option is no longer needed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| disable\_config\_load        | bool   | no       | Disable config load so that opendal will not load config from                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

Copyright © 2022-2026, The Apache Software Foundation  
Apache OpenDAL, OpenDAL, Apache, the Apache feather and the Apache OpenDAL project logo are either registered trademarks or trademarks of the Apache Software Foundation.

url: https://opendal.apache.org/services/cos/nodejs/

  // Root of this backend.

  // root: "...",


  // Endpoint of this backend.

  // endpoint: "...",


  // Secret ID of this backend.

  // secret_id: "...",


  // Secret key of this backend.

  // secret_key: "...",

  //

  // (e.g. `GetFederationToken` / `AssumeRole`). When `security_token` is

  // provided, it will be used together with `secret_id` and `secret_key`

  // bucket: "...",

  // disable_config_load: "true",


});

This is used for temporary credentials issued by Tencent Cloud STS (e.g. GetFederationToken / AssumeRole). When security\_token is provided, it will be used together with secret\_id and secret\_keyto sign requests, and the x-cos-security-token header will be attached automatically by the signer. If this field is not set, OpenDAL will also fall back to reading the token from environment variables TENCENTCLOUD\_TOKEN,TENCENTCLOUD\_SECURITY\_TOKEN or QCLOUD\_SECRET\_TOKEN (unlessdisable\_config\_load is enabled). |
| bucket                       | string | no       | Bucket of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| enable\_versioningdeprecated | bool   | no       | Deprecated: COS versioning capability is enabled by default.Deprecated since 0.57.0: COS versioning capability is enabled by default and this option is no longer needed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| disable\_config\_load        | bool   | no       | Disable config load so that opendal will not load config from                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

Copyright © 2022-2026, The Apache Software Foundation  
Apache OpenDAL, OpenDAL, Apache, the Apache feather and the Apache OpenDAL project logo are either registered trademarks or trademarks of the Apache Software Foundation.

---

---
url: https://opendal.apache.org/services/cos/rust/
---

# cos

8 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("cos", [

])?;


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("cos", [

    // Root of this backend.

    // ("root".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Endpoint of this backend.

    // ("endpoint".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Secret ID of this backend.

    // ("secret_id".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Secret key of this backend.

    // ("secret_key".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Security token (a.k.a. session token) of this backend.

    //

    // This is used for temporary credentials issued by Tencent Cloud STS

    // (e.g. `GetFederationToken` / `AssumeRole`). When `security_token` is

    // provided, it will be used together with `secret_id` and `secret_key`

    // to sign requests, and the `x-cos-security-token` header will be

    // attached automatically by the signer.

    //

    // If this field is not set, OpenDAL will also fall back to reading

    // the token from environment variables `TENCENTCLOUD_TOKEN`,

    // `TENCENTCLOUD_SECURITY_TOKEN` or `QCLOUD_SECRET_TOKEN` (unless

    // `disable_config_load` is enabled).

    // ("security_token".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Bucket of this backend.

    // ("bucket".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Disable config load so that opendal will not load config from

    // ("disable_config_load".to_string(), "true".to_string()),


])?;


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General8

| Key                          | Type   | Required | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ---------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| root                         | string | no       | Root of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| endpoint                     | string | no       | Endpoint of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| secret\_id                   | string | no       | Secret ID of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| secret\_key                  | string | no       | Secret key of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| security\_token              | string | no       | Security token (a.k.a. session token) of this backend. This is used for temporary credentials issued by Tencent Cloud STS (e.g. GetFederationToken / AssumeRole). When security\_token is provided, it will be used together with secret\_id and secret\_keyto sign requests, and the x-cos-security-token header will be attached automatically by the signer. If this field is not set, OpenDAL will also fall back to reading the token from environment variables TENCENTCLOUD\_TOKEN,TENCENTCLOUD\_SECURITY\_TOKEN or QCLOUD\_SECRET\_TOKEN (unlessdisable\_config\_load is enabled). |
| bucket                       | string | no       | Bucket of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| enable\_versioningdeprecated | bool   | no       | Deprecated: COS versioning capability is enabled by default.Deprecated since 0.57.0: COS versioning capability is enabled by default and this option is no longer needed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| disable\_config\_load        | bool   | no       | Disable config load so that opendal will not load config from                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

    # token="...",

    # account_id="...",


    # Set the database id of cloudflare api.

    # database_id="...",


    # Set the working directory of OpenDAL.

    # root="...",


    # Set the table of D1 Database.

    # table="...",


    # Set the key field of D1 Database.

    # key_field="...",


    # Set the value field of D1 Database.

    # value_field="...",


)


```

| Key      | Type   | Required | Description            |
| -------- | ------ | -------- | ---------------------- |
| root     | string | no       | The root for dbfs.     |
| endpoint | string | no       | The endpoint for dbfs. |
| token    | string | no       | The token for dbfs.    |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

Copyright © 2022-2026, The Apache Software Foundation  
Apache OpenDAL, OpenDAL, Apache, the Apache feather and the Apache OpenDAL project logo are either registered trademarks or trademarks of the Apache Software Foundation.

    // root path for dropbox.

    // ("root".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // access token for dropbox.

    // ("access_token".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // refresh_token for dropbox.

    // ("refresh_token".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // client_id for dropbox.

    // ("client_id".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // client_secret for dropbox.

    // ("client_secret".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


])?;


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

# etcd

7 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

Operator op = Operator.of("etcd", conf);


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

// network address of the Etcd services.

// If use https, must set TLS options: `ca_path`, `cert_path`, `key_path`.

// e.g. "127.0.0.1:23790,127.0.0.1:23791,127.0.0.1:23792" or "http://127.0.0.1:23790,http://127.0.0.1:23791,http://127.0.0.1:23792" or "https://127.0.0.1:23790,https://127.0.0.1:23791,https://127.0.0.1:23792"

//

// default is "http://127.0.0.1:2379"

// conf.put("endpoints", "...");


// the username to connect etcd service.

//

// default is None

// conf.put("username", "...");


// the password for authentication

//

// default is None

// conf.put("password", "...");


// the working directory of the etcd service. Can be "/path/to/dir"

//

// default is "/"

// conf.put("root", "...");


// certificate authority file path

//

// default is None

// conf.put("ca_path", "...");


// cert path

//

// default is None

// conf.put("cert_path", "...");


// key path

//

// default is None

// conf.put("key_path", "...");


Operator op = Operator.of("etcd", conf);


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General7

| Key        | Type   | Required | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ---------- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| endpoints  | string | no       | network address of the Etcd services. If use https, must set TLS options: ca\_path, cert\_path, key\_path. e.g. "127.0.0.1:23790,127.0.0.1:23791,127.0.0.1:23792" or "http://127.0.0.1:23790,http://127.0.0.1:23791,http://127.0.0.1:23792" or "https://127.0.0.1:23790,https://127.0.0.1:23791,https://127.0.0.1:23792" default is "http://127.0.0.1:2379" |
| username   | string | no       | the username to connect etcd service. default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| password   | string | no       | the password for authentication default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| root       | string | no       | the working directory of the etcd service. Can be "/path/to/dir" default is "/"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ca\_path   | string | no       | certificate authority file path default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| cert\_path | string | no       | cert path default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| key\_path  | string | no       | key path default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

Copyright © 2022-2026, The Apache Software Foundation  
Apache OpenDAL, OpenDAL, Apache, the Apache feather and the Apache OpenDAL project logo are either registered trademarks or trademarks of the Apache Software Foundation.

url: https://opendal.apache.org/services/etcd/nodejs/

  // network address of the Etcd services.

  // If use https, must set TLS options: `ca_path`, `cert_path`, `key_path`.

  // e.g. "127.0.0.1:23790,127.0.0.1:23791,127.0.0.1:23792" or "http://127.0.0.1:23790,http://127.0.0.1:23791,http://127.0.0.1:23792" or "https://127.0.0.1:23790,https://127.0.0.1:23791,https://127.0.0.1:23792"

  // username: "...",

  // default is None

  // password: "...",


  // the working directory of the etcd service. Can be "/path/to/dir"

  //

  // default is "/"

  // root: "...",


  // certificate authority file path

  //

  // default is None

  // ca_path: "...",


  // cert path

  //

  // default is None

  // cert_path: "...",


  // key path

  //

  // default is None

  // key_path: "...",


});

| ---------- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| endpoints  | string | no       | network address of the Etcd services. | username   | string | no       | the username to connect etcd service. default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| password   | string | no       | the password for authentication default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

Can be "/path/to/dir" default is "/"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ca\_path   | string | no       | certificate authority file path default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

[Services](/services/) / etcd

# etcd

7 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("etcd", [

])?;


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("etcd", [

    // network address of the Etcd services.

    // If use https, must set TLS options: `ca_path`, `cert_path`, `key_path`.

    // e.g. "127.0.0.1:23790,127.0.0.1:23791,127.0.0.1:23792" or "http://127.0.0.1:23790,http://127.0.0.1:23791,http://127.0.0.1:23792" or "https://127.0.0.1:23790,https://127.0.0.1:23791,https://127.0.0.1:23792"

    //

    // default is "http://127.0.0.1:2379"

    // ("endpoints".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // the username to connect etcd service.

    //

    // default is None

    // ("username".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // the password for authentication

    //

    // default is None

    // ("password".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // the working directory of the etcd service. Can be "/path/to/dir"

    //

    // default is "/"

    // ("root".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // certificate authority file path

    //

    // default is None

    // ("ca_path".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // cert path

    //

    // default is None

    // ("cert_path".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // key path

    //

    // default is None

    // ("key_path".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


])?;


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General7

| Key        | Type   | Required | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ---------- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| endpoints  | string | no       | network address of the Etcd services. If use https, must set TLS options: ca\_path, cert\_path, key\_path. e.g. "127.0.0.1:23790,127.0.0.1:23791,127.0.0.1:23792" or "http://127.0.0.1:23790,http://127.0.0.1:23791,http://127.0.0.1:23792" or "https://127.0.0.1:23790,https://127.0.0.1:23791,https://127.0.0.1:23792" default is "http://127.0.0.1:2379" |
| username   | string | no       | the username to connect etcd service. default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| password   | string | no       | the password for authentication default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| root       | string | no       | the working directory of the etcd service. Can be "/path/to/dir" default is "/"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ca\_path   | string | no       | certificate authority file path default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| cert\_path | string | no       | cert path default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| key\_path  | string | no       | key path default is None                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

Copyright © 2022-2026, The Apache Software Foundation  
Apache OpenDAL, OpenDAL, Apache, the Apache feather and the Apache OpenDAL project logo are either registered trademarks or trademarks of the Apache Software Foundation.

# foundationdb

2 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js

RustPythonNode.js

Quick start

```

import { Operator } from "opendal";


const op = new Operator("foundationdb", {

});


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import { Operator } from "opendal";


const op = new Operator("foundationdb", {

  // root of the backend.

  // root: "...",


  // config_path for the backend.

  // config_path: "...",


});


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General2

| Key          | Type   | Required | Description                   |
| ------------ | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------- |
| root         | string | no       | root of the backend.          |
| config\_path | string | no       | config\_path for the backend. |

)

# foyer

8 configuration options · available in Rust, Python

RustPython

Quick start

```

import opendal


op = opendal.Operator(

    "foyer",

)


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import opendal


op = opendal.Operator(

    "foyer",

    # Name for this cache instance.

    # name="...",


    # Root path of this backend.

    # root="...",


    # Memory capacity in bytes for the cache.

    # memory="1000",


    # Disk cache directory path.

    #

    # If set, enables hybrid cache with disk storage. Data will be persisted to

    # this directory when memory cache is full.

    # disk_path="...",


    # Disk cache total capacity in bytes.

    # Only used when `disk_path` is set.

    # disk_capacity="1000",


    # Individual cache file size in bytes.

    #

    # Default is 1 MiB.

    # Only used when `disk_path` is set.

    # disk_file_size="1000",


    # Recovery mode when starting the cache.

    #

    # Valid values: "none" (default), "quiet", "strict".

    # - "none": Don't recover from disk

    # - "quiet": Recover and skip errors

    # - "strict": Recover and panic on errors

    # recover_mode="...",


    # Number of shards for concurrent access.

    #

    # Default is 1. Higher values improve concurrency but increase overhead.

    # shards="1000",


)


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General8

| Key              | Type    | Required | Description                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ---------------- | ------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| name             | string  | no       | Name for this cache instance.                                                                                                                                                                          |
| root             | string  | no       | Root path of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                             |
| memory           | integer | no       | Memory capacity in bytes for the cache.                                                                                                                                                                |
| disk\_path       | string  | no       | Disk cache directory path. If set, enables hybrid cache with disk storage. Data will be persisted to this directory when memory cache is full.                                                         |
| disk\_capacity   | integer | no       | Disk cache total capacity in bytes. Only used when disk\_path is set.                                                                                                                                  |
| disk\_file\_size | integer | no       | Individual cache file size in bytes. Default is 1 MiB. Only used when disk\_path is set.                                                                                                               |
| recover\_mode    | string  | no       | Recovery mode when starting the cache. Valid values: "none" (default), "quiet", "strict". - "none": Don't recover from disk - "quiet": Recover and skip errors - "strict": Recover and panic on errors |
| shards           | integer | no       | Number of shards for concurrent access. Default is 1\. Higher values improve concurrency but increase overhead.                                                                                        |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

Copyright © 2022-2026, The Apache Software Foundation  
Apache OpenDAL, OpenDAL, Apache, the Apache feather and the Apache OpenDAL project logo are either registered trademarks or trademarks of the Apache Software Foundation.

---

---
url: https://opendal.apache.org/services/foyer/rust/
---

# foyer

8 configuration options · available in Rust, Python

RustPython

Quick start

```

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("foyer", [

])?;


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("foyer", [

    // Name for this cache instance.

    // ("name".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Root path of this backend.

    // ("root".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Memory capacity in bytes for the cache.

    // ("memory".to_string(), "1000".to_string()),


    // Disk cache directory path.

    //

    // If set, enables hybrid cache with disk storage. Data will be persisted to

    // this directory when memory cache is full.

    // ("disk_path".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Disk cache total capacity in bytes.

    // Only used when `disk_path` is set.

    // ("disk_capacity".to_string(), "1000".to_string()),


    // Individual cache file size in bytes.

    //

    // Default is 1 MiB.

    // Only used when `disk_path` is set.

    // ("disk_file_size".to_string(), "1000".to_string()),


    // Recovery mode when starting the cache.

    //

    // Valid values: "none" (default), "quiet", "strict".

    // - "none": Don't recover from disk

    // - "quiet": Recover and skip errors

    // - "strict": Recover and panic on errors

    // ("recover_mode".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Number of shards for concurrent access.

    //

    // Default is 1. Higher values improve concurrency but increase overhead.

    // ("shards".to_string(), "1000".to_string()),


])?;


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General8

| Key              | Type    | Required | Description                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ---------------- | ------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| name             | string  | no       | Name for this cache instance.                                                                                                                                                                          |
| root             | string  | no       | Root path of this backend.                                                                                                                                                                             |
| memory           | integer | no       | Memory capacity in bytes for the cache.                                                                                                                                                                |
| disk\_path       | string  | no       | Disk cache directory path. If set, enables hybrid cache with disk storage. Data will be persisted to this directory when memory cache is full.                                                         |
| disk\_capacity   | integer | no       | Disk cache total capacity in bytes. Only used when disk\_path is set.                                                                                                                                  |
| disk\_file\_size | integer | no       | Individual cache file size in bytes. Default is 1 MiB. Only used when disk\_path is set.                                                                                                               |
| recover\_mode    | string  | no       | Recovery mode when starting the cache. Valid values: "none" (default), "quiet", "strict". - "none": Don't recover from disk - "quiet": Recover and skip errors - "strict": Recover and panic on errors |
| shards           | integer | no       | Number of shards for concurrent access. Default is 1\. Higher values improve concurrency but increase overhead.                                                                                        |

# fs

2 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

Operator op = Operator.of("fs", conf);


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

// root dir for backend

// conf.put("root", "...");


// tmp dir for atomic write

// conf.put("atomic_write_dir", "...");


Operator op = Operator.of("fs", conf);


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General2

| Key                | Type   | Required | Description              |
| ------------------ | ------ | -------- | ------------------------ |
| root               | string | no       | root dir for backend     |
| atomic\_write\_dir | string | no       | tmp dir for atomic write |

RustPythonNode.jsJava

import { Operator } from "opendal";

});


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import { Operator } from "opendal";


const op = new Operator("fs", {

  // root dir for backend

  // root: "...",


  // tmp dir for atomic write

  // atomic_write_dir: "...",


});


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

General2

| ------------------ | ------ | -------- | ------------------------ |
| root               | string | no       | root dir for backend     |
| atomic\_write\_dir | string | no       | tmp dir for atomic write |

# fs

2 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

import opendal


op = opendal.Operator(

    "fs",

)


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import opendal


op = opendal.Operator(

    "fs",

    # root dir for backend

    # root="...",


    # tmp dir for atomic write

    # atomic_write_dir="...",


)


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General2

| Key                | Type   | Required | Description              |
| ------------------ | ------ | -------- | ------------------------ |
| root               | string | no       | root dir for backend     |
| atomic\_write\_dir | string | no       | tmp dir for atomic write |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

Copyright © 2022-2026, The Apache Software Foundation  
Apache OpenDAL, OpenDAL, Apache, the Apache feather and the Apache OpenDAL project logo are either registered trademarks or trademarks of the Apache Software Foundation.

# fs

2 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("fs", [

])?;


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("fs", [

    // root dir for backend

    // ("root".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // tmp dir for atomic write

    // ("atomic_write_dir".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


])?;


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General2

| Key                | Type   | Required | Description              |
| ------------------ | ------ | -------- | ------------------------ |
| root               | string | no       | root dir for backend     |
| atomic\_write\_dir | string | no       | tmp dir for atomic write |

# ftp

4 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js

RustPythonNode.js

Quick start

```

import { Operator } from "opendal";


const op = new Operator("ftp", {

});


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import { Operator } from "opendal";


const op = new Operator("ftp", {

  // endpoint of this backend

  // endpoint: "...",


  // root of this backend

  // root: "...",


  // user of this backend

  // user: "...",


  // password of this backend

  // password: "...",


});


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General4

| Key      | Type   | Required | Description              |
| -------- | ------ | -------- | ------------------------ |
| endpoint | string | no       | endpoint of this backend |
| root     | string | no       | root of this backend     |
| user     | string | no       | user of this backend     |
| password | string | no       | password of this backend |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

Copyright © 2022-2026, The Apache Software Foundation  
Apache OpenDAL, OpenDAL, Apache, the Apache feather and the Apache OpenDAL project logo are either registered trademarks or trademarks of the Apache Software Foundation.

# ftp

4 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js

RustPythonNode.js

Quick start

```

import opendal


op = opendal.Operator(

    "ftp",

)


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import opendal


op = opendal.Operator(

    "ftp",

    # endpoint of this backend

    # endpoint="...",


    # root of this backend

    # root="...",


    # user of this backend

    # user="...",


    # password of this backend

    # password="...",


)


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General4

| Key      | Type   | Required | Description              |
| -------- | ------ | -------- | ------------------------ |
| endpoint | string | no       | endpoint of this backend |
| root     | string | no       | root of this backend     |
| user     | string | no       | user of this backend     |
| password | string | no       | password of this backend |

    // endpoint of this backend

    // ("endpoint".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // root of this backend

    // ("root".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // user of this backend

    // ("user".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // password of this backend

    // ("password".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


])?;


```

# gcs

14 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

conf.put("bucket", "my-bucket");

Operator op = Operator.of("gcs", conf);


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

// --- General ---

// root URI, all operations happens under `root`

// conf.put("root", "/");


// bucket name

conf.put("bucket", "my-bucket");


// endpoint URI of GCS service,

// default is `https://storage.googleapis.com`

// conf.put("endpoint", "https://storage.googleapis.com");


// Scope for gcs.

// conf.put("scope", "...");


// --- Credentials ---

// Service Account for gcs.

// conf.put("service_account", "...");


// Credentials string for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.

// conf.put("credential", "...");


// Local path to credentials file for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.

// conf.put("credential_path", "...");


// Skip signature will skip loading credentials and signing requests.

// conf.put("skip_signature", "true");


// Disable attempting to load credentials from the GCE metadata server when

// running within Google Cloud.

// conf.put("disable_vm_metadata", "true");


// Disable loading configuration from the environment.

// conf.put("disable_config_load", "true");


// A Google Cloud OAuth2 token.

//

// Takes precedence over `credential` and `credential_path`.

// conf.put("token", "...");


// --- Behavior ---

// The predefined acl for GCS.

// conf.put("predefined_acl", "...");


// The default storage class used by gcs.

// conf.put("default_storage_class", "...");


Operator op = Operator.of("gcs", conf);


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General4

| Key                                            | Type   | Required | Description                                                            |
| ---------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| rootdefault /                                  | string | no       | root URI, all operations happens under root                            |
| buckete.g. my-bucket                           | string | yes      | bucket name                                                            |
| endpointdefault https://storage.googleapis.com | string | no       | endpoint URI of GCS service, default is https://storage.googleapis.com |
| scope                                          | string | no       | Scope for gcs.                                                         |

Credentials7

| Key                   | Type   | Required | Description                                                                                           |
| --------------------- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| service\_account      | string | no       | Service Account for gcs.                                                                              |
| credential            | string | no       | Credentials string for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.                                             |
| credential\_path      | string | no       | Local path to credentials file for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.                                 |
| skip\_signature       | bool   | no       | Skip signature will skip loading credentials and signing requests.                                    |
| disable\_vm\_metadata | bool   | no       | Disable attempting to load credentials from the GCE metadata server when running within Google Cloud. |
| disable\_config\_load | bool   | no       | Disable loading configuration from the environment.                                                   |
| token                 | string | no       | A Google Cloud OAuth2 token. Takes precedence over credential and credential\_path.                   |

Behavior2

| Key                     | Type   | Required | Description                            |
| ----------------------- | ------ | -------- | -------------------------------------- |
| predefined\_acl         | string | no       | The predefined acl for GCS.            |
| default\_storage\_class | string | no       | The default storage class used by gcs. |

Deprecated1

| Key                        | Type | Required | Description                                                                                                                                                    |
| -------------------------- | ---- | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| allow\_anonymousdeprecated | bool | no       | Allow opendal to send requests without signing when credentials are not loaded.Deprecated since 0.57.0: Please use skip\_signature instead of allow\_anonymous |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

Copyright © 2022-2026, The Apache Software Foundation  
Apache OpenDAL, OpenDAL, Apache, the Apache feather and the Apache OpenDAL project logo are either registered trademarks or trademarks of the Apache Software Foundation.

---

---
url: https://opendal.apache.org/services/gcs/nodejs/

# gcs

14 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

import { Operator } from "opendal";


const op = new Operator("gcs", {

  bucket: "my-bucket",

});


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import { Operator } from "opendal";


const op = new Operator("gcs", {

  // --- General ---

  // root URI, all operations happens under `root`

  // root: "/",


  // bucket name

  bucket: "my-bucket",


  // endpoint URI of GCS service,

  // default is `https://storage.googleapis.com`

  // endpoint: "https://storage.googleapis.com",


  // Scope for gcs.

  // scope: "...",


  // --- Credentials ---

  // Service Account for gcs.

  // service_account: "...",


  // Credentials string for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.

  // credential: "...",


  // Local path to credentials file for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.

  // credential_path: "...",


  // Skip signature will skip loading credentials and signing requests.

  // skip_signature: "true",


  // Disable attempting to load credentials from the GCE metadata server when

  // running within Google Cloud.

  // disable_vm_metadata: "true",


  // Disable loading configuration from the environment.

  // disable_config_load: "true",


  // A Google Cloud OAuth2 token.

  //

  // Takes precedence over `credential` and `credential_path`.

  // token: "...",


  // --- Behavior ---

  // The predefined acl for GCS.

  // predefined_acl: "...",


  // The default storage class used by gcs.

  // default_storage_class: "...",


});


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General4

| Key                                            | Type   | Required | Description                                                            |
| ---------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| rootdefault /                                  | string | no       | root URI, all operations happens under root                            |
| buckete.g. my-bucket                           | string | yes      | bucket name                                                            |
| endpointdefault https://storage.googleapis.com | string | no       | endpoint URI of GCS service, default is https://storage.googleapis.com |
| scope                                          | string | no       | Scope for gcs.                                                         |

Credentials7

| Key                   | Type   | Required | Description                                                                                           |
| --------------------- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| service\_account      | string | no       | Service Account for gcs.                                                                              |
| credential            | string | no       | Credentials string for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.                                             |
| credential\_path      | string | no       | Local path to credentials file for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.                                 |
| skip\_signature       | bool   | no       | Skip signature will skip loading credentials and signing requests.                                    |
| disable\_vm\_metadata | bool   | no       | Disable attempting to load credentials from the GCE metadata server when running within Google Cloud. |
| disable\_config\_load | bool   | no       | Disable loading configuration from the environment.                                                   |
| token                 | string | no       | A Google Cloud OAuth2 token. Takes precedence over credential and credential\_path.                   |

Behavior2

| Key                     | Type   | Required | Description                            |
| ----------------------- | ------ | -------- | -------------------------------------- |
| predefined\_acl         | string | no       | The predefined acl for GCS.            |
| default\_storage\_class | string | no       | The default storage class used by gcs. |

Deprecated1

| Key                        | Type | Required | Description                                                                                                                                                    |
| -------------------------- | ---- | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| allow\_anonymousdeprecated | bool | no       | Allow opendal to send requests without signing when credentials are not loaded.Deprecated since 0.57.0: Please use skip\_signature instead of allow\_anonymous |

# gcs

14 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

import opendal


op = opendal.Operator(

    "gcs",

    bucket="my-bucket",

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import opendal


op = opendal.Operator(

    "gcs",

    # --- General ---

    # root URI, all operations happens under `root`

    # root="/",


    # bucket name

    bucket="my-bucket",


    # endpoint URI of GCS service,

    # default is `https://storage.googleapis.com`

    # endpoint="https://storage.googleapis.com",


    # Scope for gcs.

    # scope="...",


    # --- Credentials ---

    # Service Account for gcs.

    # service_account="...",


    # Credentials string for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.

    # credential="...",


    # Local path to credentials file for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.

    # credential_path="...",


    # Skip signature will skip loading credentials and signing requests.

    # skip_signature="true",


    # Disable attempting to load credentials from the GCE metadata server when

    # running within Google Cloud.

    # disable_vm_metadata="true",


    # Disable loading configuration from the environment.

    # disable_config_load="true",


    # A Google Cloud OAuth2 token.

    #

    # Takes precedence over `credential` and `credential_path`.

    # token="...",


    # --- Behavior ---

    # The predefined acl for GCS.

    # predefined_acl="...",


    # The default storage class used by gcs.

    # default_storage_class="...",


)


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

# gcs

14 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("gcs", [

    ("bucket".to_string(), "my-bucket".to_string()),

])?;


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("gcs", [

    // --- General ---

    // root URI, all operations happens under `root`

    // ("root".to_string(), "/".to_string()),


    // bucket name

    ("bucket".to_string(), "my-bucket".to_string()),


    // endpoint URI of GCS service,

    // default is `https://storage.googleapis.com`

    // ("endpoint".to_string(), "https://storage.googleapis.com".to_string()),


    // Scope for gcs.

    // ("scope".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // --- Credentials ---

    // Service Account for gcs.

    // ("service_account".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Credentials string for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.

    // ("credential".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Local path to credentials file for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.

    // ("credential_path".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // Skip signature will skip loading credentials and signing requests.

    // ("skip_signature".to_string(), "true".to_string()),


    // Disable attempting to load credentials from the GCE metadata server when

    // running within Google Cloud.

    // ("disable_vm_metadata".to_string(), "true".to_string()),


    // Disable loading configuration from the environment.

    // ("disable_config_load".to_string(), "true".to_string()),


    // A Google Cloud OAuth2 token.

    //

    // Takes precedence over `credential` and `credential_path`.

    // ("token".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // --- Behavior ---

    // The predefined acl for GCS.

    // ("predefined_acl".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // The default storage class used by gcs.

    // ("default_storage_class".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


])?;


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General4

| Key                                            | Type   | Required | Description                                                            |
| ---------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| rootdefault /                                  | string | no       | root URI, all operations happens under root                            |
| buckete.g. my-bucket                           | string | yes      | bucket name                                                            |
| endpointdefault https://storage.googleapis.com | string | no       | endpoint URI of GCS service, default is https://storage.googleapis.com |
| scope                                          | string | no       | Scope for gcs.                                                         |

Credentials7

| Key                   | Type   | Required | Description                                                                                           |
| --------------------- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| service\_account      | string | no       | Service Account for gcs.                                                                              |
| credential            | string | no       | Credentials string for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.                                             |
| credential\_path      | string | no       | Local path to credentials file for GCS service OAuth2 authentication.                                 |
| skip\_signature       | bool   | no       | Skip signature will skip loading credentials and signing requests.                                    |
| disable\_vm\_metadata | bool   | no       | Disable attempting to load credentials from the GCE metadata server when running within Google Cloud. |
| disable\_config\_load | bool   | no       | Disable loading configuration from the environment.                                                   |
| token                 | string | no       | A Google Cloud OAuth2 token. Takes precedence over credential and credential\_path.                   |

Behavior2

| Key                     | Type   | Required | Description                            |
| ----------------------- | ------ | -------- | -------------------------------------- |
| predefined\_acl         | string | no       | The predefined acl for GCS.            |
| default\_storage\_class | string | no       | The default storage class used by gcs. |

Deprecated1

| Key                        | Type | Required | Description                                                                                                                                                    |
| -------------------------- | ---- | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| allow\_anonymousdeprecated | bool | no       | Allow opendal to send requests without signing when credentials are not loaded.Deprecated since 0.57.0: Please use skip\_signature instead of allow\_anonymous |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

Apache OpenDAL, OpenDAL, Apache, the Apache feather and the Apache OpenDAL project logo are either registered trademarks or trademarks of the Apache Software Foundation.

# gdrive

5 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

Operator op = Operator.of("gdrive", conf);


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

// The root for gdrive

// conf.put("root", "...");


// Access token for gdrive.

// conf.put("access_token", "...");


// Refresh token for gdrive.

// conf.put("refresh_token", "...");


// Client id for gdrive.

// conf.put("client_id", "...");


// Client secret for gdrive.

// conf.put("client_secret", "...");


Operator op = Operator.of("gdrive", conf);


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General5

| Key            | Type   | Required | Description               |
| -------------- | ------ | -------- | ------------------------- |
| root           | string | no       | The root for gdrive       |
| access\_token  | string | no       | Access token for gdrive.  |
| refresh\_token | string | no       | Refresh token for gdrive. |
| client\_id     | string | no       | Client id for gdrive.     |
| client\_secret | string | no       | Client secret for gdrive. |

[![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)![Apache Software Foundation](/./img/asf_logo_wide.svg)](https://www.apache.org/)

# gdrive

5 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

import { Operator } from "opendal";


const op = new Operator("gdrive", {

});


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import { Operator } from "opendal";


const op = new Operator("gdrive", {

  // The root for gdrive

  // root: "...",


  // Access token for gdrive.

  // access_token: "...",


  // Refresh token for gdrive.

  // refresh_token: "...",


  // Client id for gdrive.

  // client_id: "...",


  // Client secret for gdrive.

  // client_secret: "...",


});


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General5

| Key            | Type   | Required | Description               |
| -------------- | ------ | -------- | ------------------------- |
| root           | string | no       | The root for gdrive       |
| access\_token  | string | no       | Access token for gdrive.  |
| refresh\_token | string | no       | Refresh token for gdrive. |
| client\_id     | string | no       | Client id for gdrive.     |
| client\_secret | string | no       | Client secret for gdrive. |

    "gdrive",

import opendal


op = opendal.Operator(

    "gdrive",

    # The root for gdrive

    # root="...",


    # Access token for gdrive.

    # access_token="...",


    # Refresh token for gdrive.

    # refresh_token="...",


    # Client id for gdrive.

    # client_id="...",


    # Client secret for gdrive.

    # client_secret="...",


)


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

# ghac

4 configuration options · available in Rust, Python, Node.js, Java

RustPythonNode.jsJava

Quick start

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

Operator op = Operator.of("ghac", conf);


```

All configuration options (copy & trim)

Full reference

```

import java.util.HashMap;

import java.util.Map;

import org.apache.opendal.Operator;


Map<String, String> conf = new HashMap<>();

// The root path for ghac.

// conf.put("root", "...");


// The version that used by cache.

// conf.put("version", "...");


// The endpoint for ghac service.

// conf.put("endpoint", "...");


// The runtime token for ghac service.

// conf.put("runtime_token", "...");


Operator op = Operator.of("ghac", conf);


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General4

| Key            | Type   | Required | Description                         |
| -------------- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------- |
| root           | string | no       | The root path for ghac.             |
| version        | string | no       | The version that used by cache.     |
| endpoint       | string | no       | The endpoint for ghac service.      |
| runtime\_token | string | no       | The runtime token for ghac service. |

use opendal::Operator;


let op = Operator::via_iter("ghac", [

    // The root path for ghac.

    // ("root".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // The version that used by cache.

    // ("version".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // The endpoint for ghac service.

    // ("endpoint".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


    // The runtime token for ghac service.

    // ("runtime_token".to_string(), "...".to_string()),


])?;


```

Every option is passed as a string key; OpenDAL parses it into the right type. Some services may require building the binding with the matching `services-*` feature enabled.

## Configuration reference

General4

| Key            | Type   | Required | Description                         |
| -------------- | ------ | -------- | ----------------------------------- |
| root           | string | no       | The root path for ghac.             |
| version        | string | no       | The version that used by cache.     |
| endpoint       | string | no       | The endpoint for ghac service.      |
| runtime\_token | string | no       | The runtime token for ghac service. |
